<!--
Title: use Conventional Commits (feat:, fix:, chore:, docs:, refactor:, test:, perf:, ci:).
semantic-release parses it to compute the next version — `feat:` = minor, `fix:` = patch,
`feat!:` or `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer = major.
-->

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] `mise run test` passes
- [ ] `mise run format` applied
- [ ] `mise run check_documentation` applied
- [ ] `mise run check_code` applied
- [ ] `mise run check_commit_title` applied
